c.d: How intuitive and user-friendly the app interface is for discovering, playing, and managing podcasts
Availability across different devices and operating systems including iOS, Android, Desktop, and smart devices
Inclusion of playback enhancements such as trim silence, volume boost, sleep timer, and cross-device syncing
Number of podcasts and episodes accessible through the app, including exclusive or original content
Free availability versus subscription or one-time purchase fees and the features gated behind payment
Capabilities of the app to provide curated recommendations, personalized playlists, and discovery features
Ability to handle various podcast formats including audio and video podcasts or RSS feed imports
Compatibility with devices like smart speakers, watches, car interfaces, and multi-device syncing
